nodes.name: Google Calendar: Check For Conflict
nodes.notes: Raw Calendar API call — n8n's native Calendar getAll node was found to intermittently ignore timeMin/timeMax filtering in this instance, so conflict checks go direct to the API instead.

nodes.name: Build Emergency Row
nodes.notes: Column order must exactly match the Bookings sheet header row (A-BA).

parameters.jsCode:
const j = $input.first().json;
const row = [
  j.bookingId, j.submittedAt, "Emergency Meeting Request", "Pending",
  j.meetingDate, j.meetingTime, "", j.timezone,
  j.fullName, j.email, j.phone, "",
  j.businessName, j.businessWebsite || "", j.serviceInterest, j.budgetRange,
  j.emergencyDetails, j.leadSource, j.leadSourceOther || "", j.preferredContactMethod || "",
  (j.additionalParticipants || []).join(", "), j.agreementAccepted, j.agreementVersion, j.agreementTimestamp,
  j.conflictDetected ? "Yes" : "No", "No", "", "",
  "", "No", "No", "No",
  "", "", "", "",
  new Date().toISOString(), "automation", "website",
  j.utmSource || "", j.utmMedium || "", j.utmCampaign || "", j.utmContent || "", j.utmTerm || "",
  j.pageUrl || "", j.referrer || "", j.ipAddress || "", j.userAgent || "",
  "1.0.0", "", j.submissionId, "", 0
];
return [{ json: { ...j, row } }];

parameters.subject: =URGENT Meeting Request — {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.businessName }} — Action Required
parameters.message:
=

Conflict detected: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.conflictDetected ? 'YES' : 'NO' }}

Booking ID: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.bookingId }}

Name: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.fullName }}

Business: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.businessName }}

Phone: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.phone }}

Email: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.email }}

Requested: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.meetingDate }} {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.meetingTime }} ET

Urgent issue: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.emergencyDetails }}

parameters.subject: We received your emergency meeting request — Velor Digital
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.fullName.split(' ')[0] }},

We received your emergency meeting request.

Requested date: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.meetingDate }}
Requested time: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.meetingTime }} ET
Booking ID: {{ $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.bookingId }}

This time has not been confirmed yet. Our team will review the request and contact you as soon as possible to approve the meeting or offer another available time.

Please reply to this email if there is additional information we should know.

Velor Digital

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { values: [ [ $now.toISO(), $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.bookingId, $execution.id, 'WORKFLOW_COMPLETED', 'success', 1, '', $('Verify Signature & Parse Input').item.json.submissionId, '1.0.0' ] ] } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, bookingId: $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.bookingId, status: 'Pending', conflictDetected: $('Build Emergency Row').item.json.conflictDetected } }}

nodes.name: Extract Booking Row Number
nodes.notes: Parses the Sheets append response to get the real row number, so the notification-sent flags can be marked Yes immediately instead of waiting for the retry workflow.

nodes.name: HTTP: Mark Notifications Sent
nodes.notes: Marks AD/AE/AF Yes right after the client email send succeeds.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { valueInputOption: 'RAW', data: [ { range: 'Bookings!AD' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber + ':AD' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber, values: [['Yes']] }, { range: 'Bookings!AE' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber + ':AE' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber, values: [['Yes']] }, { range: 'Bookings!AF' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber + ':AF' + $('Extract Booking Row Number').item.json.bookingRowNumber, values: [['Yes']] } ] } }}
